name: Homemade Taco Seasoning Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a storage container with a tight-fitting lid, combine all ingredients.
2. Mix well until evenly distributed.
3. Seal the container tightly.
4. Store in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months.
5. The mixture makes about half a cup (21 teaspoons).
6. Note that seven teaspoons of this mix equal one and a quarter ounces of purchased taco seasoning mix.
